title: Assistant Store Manager - Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crossword Bookstores Consulting Pvt Ltd!
